{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032121463081546D2530014C0C1534"}"},"total":7000},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7370765404484748057","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"全程无尿点，我用了四十个小时睡了六小时追完的，这是目前我三年内看到的最好的一本黑道文，主角智商在线，兄弟肝胆相照，这才是快意江湖。伏笔很好，作者有心。兄弟们冲就对了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1716144376,"group_id":"7309751717405395978","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"小书迷一枚","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4QmrGtHhkFYnWnkbmuWUvo=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616050&x-signature=DrAQG0h3j%2BuZjDoa%2FpIJp7vPNFs%3D","user_id":"50057829126","user_name":"橘子家的超帅"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"50057829126","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1776104982,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"},{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7309751717405395978","book_info":{"abstract":"爱了三年的校花被人蹂躏至死！
什么都没做过的陈学文却被人指认入狱！
老实巴交的父母在申冤路上双双惨死！
活了十九年，循规蹈矩，遵纪守法的陈学文，终于看清了这个世界的真面目。
“杀人放火金腰带，修桥补路无尸骸！”

“别人能杀人放火，我陈学文为何不可？”

“别人能草芥人命，我陈学文为何不可？”

“别人能高高在上，我陈学文为何不可？”

“我既然选择走这条路，那我就要比坏人更坏，比恶人更恶！”

“我不要一人之下，我只要万人之上！”
“我要活着，就不介意让别人死！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/81e606c8bc724aebd36667465db5342b","author":"简单的鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"7309751717405395978","book_name":"黑社会：雄霸天下","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b81820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"47.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":826,"name":"黑道","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=826&name=黑道&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1460,"name":"都市江湖","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1460&name=都市江湖&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7309752448645038630","read_count":"476870","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"7018789"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"3703","tags":"都市日常,都市,黑道,都市江湖","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3fa256a1cd04ca1f3c07980f67039f18~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779284790&x-signature=hhAIJWPBdowmws3Tj%2BZJrsA6QgI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"104807792926","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"794"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032121463081546D2530014C0C1534"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读37小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":18,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":81742,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":132646,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":35773},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7529142837692154686","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好一个明修栈道，暗度陈仓。作者文史是真的好，这本小说好多桥段都是历史的具象化。
卧薪尝胆：陈学文与候五爷
二桃杀三士：平州十二区老大候选人的争夺
奉主上以令不臣：黄超飞事件
浑水摸鱼、金蝉脱壳、偷梁换柱、假痴不癫、上屋抽梯、偷天换日、反客为主、以毒攻毒、连环计、走为上计、抛砖引玉、打草惊蛇、调虎离山、欲盖弥彰、借尸还魂、擒贼擒王、釜底抽薪、关门捉贼、远交近攻、纵横捭阖等等，这些真的都有体现。","text_exts":[{"e":12,"s":8,"text":"暗度陈仓","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9A%97%E5%BA%A6%E9%99%88%E4%BB%93&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741007904C0C1534%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227529142837692154686%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227309751717405395978%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9A%97%E5%BA%A6%E9%99%88%E4%BB%93%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753020786,"group_id":"7309751717405395978","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"什么都爱看看看看看看看看看看","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N08K2T+lClsVDP99gE2vs9jAzwBUVP5gZKk1KaGvqVQI","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fe02325d5f93469cbf65139bd8f3e67d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776620963&x-signature=qTVNr5j9Cm5Wt3W4dkoawL15q8Y%3D","user_id":"4284154025098623","user_name":"无所谓的狐狸呦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4284154025098623","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7309751717405395978","book_info":{"abstract":"爱了三年的校花被人蹂躏至死！
